message:
refactor(core): use mul_add for FMA accuracy, simplify config parsing, and improve pattern overlap matching

- atc_adaptation: replace manual multiply-subtract with f64::mul_add for
  EXP3 log-weight update, improving numerical precision on hardware with
  fused multiply-add support
- atc_policy_certificates: same mul_add treatment for confidence sequence
  running_m2 accumulation
- config: collapse nested if-match for inline comment extraction into a
  single pattern guard, reducing indentation without changing behaviour
- pattern_overlap: mark fold_ascii_case as const fn; merge redundant
  AnyChar/AnyChar and Literal/AnyChar match arms into an or-pattern for
  clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
